title: कर्पूरगौरम् करुणावतारम्
devanagariText:
॥ कर्पूरगौरम् ॥

कर्पूरगौरं करुणावतारं
संसारसारं भुजगेन्द्रहारम्।
सदा वसन्तं हृदयारविन्दे
भवं भवानीसहितं नमामि॥

॥ इति कर्पूरगौरम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Karpura Gauram ||

Karpura Gauram Karunavataram
Samsara Saaram Bhujagendra Haaram |
Sada Vasantam Hridayaaravinde
Bhavam Bhavanee Sahitam Namaami ||

|| Iti Karpura Gauram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
कर्पूर के समान गौर वर्ण वाले, करुणा के अवतार, संसार के सार, सर्पों के राजा का हार धारण करने वाले, सदा हृदय कमल में निवास करने वाले, भवानी (पार्वती) सहित भगवान शिव को मैं नमस्कार करता हूँ।

यह श्लोक शिवजी की आरती के अंत में सम्पूर्ण भारत में गाया जाता है। यह अत्यंत लोकप्रिय और पवित्र मंत्र है।
benefits: Most popular closing verse of Shiva aarti across India
Invokes Shiva and Parvati together for complete blessings
Purifies the heart and brings spiritual peace
Removes all fears and attachments to worldly life
Simple yet profound — ideal for daily recitation
description: The Karpura Gauram Karunavataram, known in Sanskrit as कर्पूरगौरम् करुणावतारम्, is a sacred prayer in praise of Lord Shiva. This revered text originates from Traditional Shaivite Aarti. Devotees recite this prayer to purify the heart and bring spiritual peace and remove all fears and attachments to worldly life. It is also said to invoke Shiva and Parvati together for complete blessings. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Monday (Somvar) and Daily and during Maha Shivaratri and Shravan Somvar. Comprising 1 verses, it can be completed in approximately 1 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Karpura Gauram Karunavataram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Karpura Gauram Karunavataram mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Most popular Shiva aarti closing verse recited across India.
